name: Party Pick-up Chicken Livers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F. Place the bread crumbs in a small dish.
Dip each chicken liver in melted butter, then coat with bread crumbs.
Arrange on a lightly greased baking sheet.
2. Bake the livers for 15 to 20 minutes, or until cooked through and crispy
on the outside.
3. In a small saucepan, combine ketchup, brown sugar, mustard, and Worcestershire sauce.
Heat the sauce to boiling, stirring to dissolve the sugar. Serve the warm livers
with the hot sauce for dipping.
